note: Replay plan events were derived from effective adapter trace_events generated from source test evidence.

events.evidence: tests/cjson_add.c line 446: TEST_ASSERT_NOT_NULL(true_item = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(root, "true")); TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_INT(true_item->type, cJSON_True); similarly for false.

operation_metadata.description: cJSON add bool to object and retrieve via GetObjectItemCaseSensitive, verify type

events.input: create object, add bool keys 'true' and 'false' with values true and false
events.expected: GetObjectItemCaseSensitive returns non-null items, and item types equal cJSON_True and cJSON_False respectively

events.evidence: tests/cjson_add.c line 442: TEST_ASSERT_NOT_NULL(false_item = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(root, "false")); TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_INT(false_item->type, cJSON_False);

operation_metadata.description: cJSON add false to object and retrieve via GetObjectItemCaseSensitive, verify type

events.input: create object, add false key with value false
events.expected: GetObjectItemCaseSensitive returns non-null item, and its type equals cJSON_False

events.evidence: tests/cjson_add.c line 466: TEST_ASSERT_NOT_NULL(array = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(...)), TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL_INT(array->type, cJSON_Array)

operation_metadata.description: Create object, add empty array via insert, retrieve and verify type is array

input.case: cJSON_CreateObject(); cJSON_AddArrayToObject(root, "array"); cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(root, "array")

expected.observable_behavior: Retrieved item is not null and is an array (type JsonValue::Array)

input.case: cJSON_CreateObject(); cJSON_AddNullToObject(root, "null"); cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(root, "null")

expected.observable_behavior: Retrieved item exists and is JsonValue::Null

operation_metadata.normalization: exact string equality of JSON output
